MaxLineLength:BudgetScreen.kt$modifier = Modifier.padding(start = MaterialTheme.dimens.lg, end = MaterialTheme.dimens.lg, top = 14.dp, bottom = MaterialTheme.dimens.xs)

MaxLineLength:HaikuReceiptExtractor.kt$HaikuReceiptExtractor.Companion$"Couldn't read this receipt clearly. Retake the photo in good light with the receipt flat and the text in focus."

MaxLineLength:HistoryScreen.kt$modifier = Modifier.padding(start = MaterialTheme.dimens.xl, end = MaterialTheme.dimens.xl, top = MaterialTheme.dimens.xxl, bottom = MaterialTheme.dimens.lg)
MaxLineLength:HistoryScreen.kt$val activeEmpty = if (mode == HistoryMode.RECEIPTS) state.receiptGroups.isEmpty() else state.groups.isEmpty()
MaxLineLength:HistoryViewModel.kt$HistoryViewModel$periodIncome = income.fold(BigDecimal.ZERO) { a, r -> a + r.periodAmount(windowStart, windowEnd, span) }
MaxLineLength:HomeScreen.kt$modifier = Modifier.padding(start = MaterialTheme.dimens.xs, top = MaterialTheme.dimens.xxl, bottom = MaterialTheme.dimens.lg)
MaxLineLength:InsightsQuiz.kt$InsightsQuiz$/** Index of the currency step. It sits right after the goal question, before the income step, so the amount fields can show the chosen symbol. */
MaxLineLength:InsightsScreen.kt$Text("+${source.amount.formatMoney()}", style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = amountColor)
MaxLineLength:InsightsScreen.kt$Text("+${state.periodIncome.formatMoney()}", style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = green)
MaxLineLength:InsightsScreen.kt$Text(amount, style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = amountColor)
MaxLineLength:InsightsScreen.kt$Text(entity.label, style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium, fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold, maxLines = 1, overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis)

MaxLineLength:InsightsScreen.kt$Text(recurringSubtitle(source.entity, includeCategory = false), style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant, maxLines = 1)
MaxLineLength:InsightsScreen.kt$Text(source.entity.label, style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium, fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold, maxLines = 1, overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis)
MaxLineLength:InsightsScreen.kt$Text(title, style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleSmall, fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold, textAlign = TextAlign.Center)
MaxLineLength:OnboardingScreen.kt$val width by animateDpAsState(if (selected) MaterialTheme.dimens.xxl else MaterialTheme.dimens.sm, label = "dotWidth")
MaxLineLength:PaywallScreen.kt$Icon(icon, contentDescription = null, tint = iconTint, modifier = Modifier.size(MaterialTheme.dimens.avatar))

MaxLineLength:PeriodStepper.kt${ Icon(Icons.Filled.Check, contentDescription = null, tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary) }
MaxLineLength:ScanWidget.kt$style = TextStyle(color = WidgetColors.onSurface, fontSize = 14.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold)
MaxLineLength:ScanWidget.kt$style = TextStyle(color = WidgetColors.onSurface, fontSize = 19.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold)
MaxLineLength:ThisWeekWidget.kt$style = TextStyle(color = deltaColor, fontSize = if (large) 13.sp else 11.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium)
MaxLineLength:UploadScreen.kt$contentPadding = PaddingValues(start = MaterialTheme.dimens.lg, end = MaterialTheme.dimens.lg, top = MaterialTheme.dimens.md, bottom = MaterialTheme.dimens.lg)
MaxLineLength:UploadViewModel.kt$UploadUiState$/** Money paid beyond items, discount and tax (delivery/service fees, a courier tip); added to the total, not itemized. */
MaxLineLength:UploadViewModel.kt$UploadUiState$/** The receipt's printed subtotal (clean item-sum anchor); drives the blocking "a line may be missing" check. Null = no check. */
MaxLineLength:UploadViewModel.kt$UploadUiState$/** What the items should sum to per the receipt (subtotal/total); drives the soft price-mismatch warning. Null = no warning. */
MaxLineLength:WidgetsScreen.kt$Icon(Icons.Filled.DonutLarge, contentDescription = null, tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary, modifier = Modifier.size(if (large) 15.dp else 14.dp))
MaxLineLength:WidgetsScreen.kt$Icon(Icons.Filled.PhotoCamera, contentDescription = null, tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary, modifier = Modifier.size(28.dp))
MaxLineLength:WidgetsScreen.kt$Icon(Icons.Filled.PhotoCamera, contentDescription = null, tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary, modifier = Modifier.size(30.dp))

MaxLineLength:WidgetsScreen.kt$Text(stringResource(R.string.widget_scan_action), style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelLarge, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary)

TopLevelPropertyNaming:LoginScreen.kt$/** * Stable test tags on the three login controls. The root `testTagsAsResourceId` (see MainActivity) * exposes these to UI-automation tools as view resource-ids, so Firebase Test Lab's Robo login * directives can target them by name (kept in sync with scripts/testlab-robo.sh) to sign in during * an automated crawl. Invisible at runtime. */ const val LoginTagEmail = "login_email"
